details.pattern: Agent collaboration context with SolidJS store, mock agents, panel toggle
details.note: Agent collaboration context with AgentState, AgentRole, AgentStatus types, mock agents for demo, reactive store management, and toggle for panel visibility

details.pattern: Agent column component with thinking animation, tool calls, files, activity feed
details.note: Vertical column component showing agent header with role badge, status dot with pulse animation, thinking section with typewriter fade-in, tool call with expandable result, edited files list, and chronological activity feed

details.pattern: Agent collaboration panel container with horizontal columns layout
details.note: Panel container with toggle button, backdrop overlay, topbar with agent count, horizontal scrollable column layout, empty state when no agents

details.pattern: CSS with slide-in panel animation, status dot pulsing, thinking bounce animation, typewriter fade-in
details.note: Full CSS for agent collaboration panel including panel slide-in/out transitions, status dot pulse animations (blue/green/red), thinking bounce dots, typing fade-in lines, tool and file section styling, and prefers-reduced-motion support
Re-exports AgentCollaboration, AgentColumn, useAgentCollaboration, AgentCollaborationProvider and types
